title: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation & Painting of “U Stamp” Pressure Vessels
content:
Project Name: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation & Painting of “U Stamp” Pressure Vessels - 120 Nos for TDE TATWEER - PHASE V.
Client: EXTERRAN ENERGY FZE.
Project code: 4020015.
Description: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation & Painting of “U Stamp” Pressure Vessel as per ASME VIII Division 1, Latest Edition, with “ASME “ Stamp & NBR (120 nos).
Location: SHARJAH.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Market sector: Oil & Gas.
Status: Completed 2020.
Duration: FEB 2020 – JULY 2020.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
